sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9237" key="a)nomoio/tropos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνομοιό-τροπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n9237.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">differing in modality</tr_> (including quantity and quality, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πρότασις</foreign> Eustr <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in A Po.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg034.perseus-grc1:52:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">52.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
